regulations.title: Norwegian Pollution Control Act Amendment
regulations.summary: Oslo Seafood phosphorus discharge 15% above new 1.5 mg/L limit; voluntary disclosure required.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: EPS fish box reuse targets from 2030; Commission seafood sector guidance published September 2025.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Soy aquaculture feed due diligence declarations required from Skretting and Cargill by end Q1 2026.
